title: 'Achyow #0283
definition:
Ahio = "brotherly" or "fraternal"

 1) son of Abinadab who sheltered the ark
 2) a Benjamite
 3) another Benjamite of Saul's ancestry
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ahio = "brotherly" or "fraternal"

 1) son of Abinadab who sheltered the ark

    NASB:  brotherly, the name of several Isr.
